sections.paragraph:
verb לנשוב

to blow

verb לשוב

to return, come back; do again, repeat; repent, regret

verb לשבת

to sit, sit down; reside, dwell, stay; be placed; attend a meeting; do time, serve a sentence

verb להישבות

be captured, taken prisoner; be captivated, enchanted

verb להשיב (>>לְהָשִׁיב)

to return; give back; restore; revoke; answer, reply

verb להשיב (>>לְהַשִּׁיב)

to blow, cause to blow; blow away

noun

old person, aged

adjective

coming back, returning
